case_title: MELISSA SERRANO VS. ONA M. RODGERS

docket_entries.description: EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED OCT-01-2010 ORDERED DESTROYED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY SERRANO, MELISSA AS TO DEFENDANT RODGERS, ONA M. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-27-2010 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-27-2010 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-27-2010 BY PAUL SLAVIT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED JUN-29-2010, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT RODGERS, ONA M.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-27-2010 - JUDGMENT.
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF SERRANO, MELISSA AS TO DEFENDANT RODGERS, ONA M.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SERRANO, MELISSA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT RODGERS, ONA M. THE EVIDENCE PRESENTED WAS NOT SUFFICIENT TO ESTABLISH THE SOURCE OF THE WATER INCURSION, OR TO DEFENDANT'S LIABILITY FOR IT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
